infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is required to record your 60-second candidate video.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is required to record your 60-second candidate video.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location access helps identify candidates on your ballot.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow 1 Minute Candidate to access your camera for recording.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow 1 Minute Candidate to access your microphone for recording.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow 1 Minute Candidate to use your location to find candidates on your ballot.
